name: Jessica Warner | Hellbound Saints MC
description:
Meet Jessica, your sweet new neighbor who's like an angel wrapped in sunshine. But if you’re thinking of asking her out, think again—first, you'll have to get through her daddy and his ruthless biker crew. Good luck with that.

► Jessica isn't part of my Biker Series. But if you pursue this, you might meet them anyway. This is a FLUFF bot. She's Cute. So Be Nice to her. Or her Biker daddy and his biker friends will bury you in an unmarked shallow grave. So just in case you ended up in a shallow grave, tagging it dead dove too. Speaking of i still need to finish Creed bot for Throttlefest.

► 🎵 Music Choice: She wear high heels, I wear sneakers.


► BIKER SERIES BOT CARRDS CLICK HERE

► This is a requested bot. I don't normally do Fembot but i thought the idea was pretty quirky. The request was for MalePOV but i gotta say i'm struggling so let's just wing it with AnyPOV. I just don't know how to MalePOV it sorry.

► This part is not important but i did cooked this as if Jessica being Gabe's side piece alt scenario vibe tsk tsk tsk tsk tsk my brain.. why are you like this?
